arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Donyell Malen from Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa have completed the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund as they look to bolster their attacking options for the second half of the season.
Borussia Dortmund have confirmed that Donyell Malen has joined Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'reject' £40m Jhon Duran bid from Premier League rival amid Barcelona, PSG interest
arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly fending off interest for Jhon Duran from West Ham United, who have seen a £40m bid for the Colombian striker rejected.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Aston Villa complete £20m transfer as Unai Emery lands prime target
arts.sum: Malen started 21 league games for Dortmund last season and also played a part in the club’s run to the Champions League final, scoring in the last 16 first leg against former club PSV. Aston Villa have completed the signing of Donyell Malen in a deal worth around £20m plus add-ons.

arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa announce the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Malen signs for Villa from Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa have completed the signing of Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund in a deal worth a total of just over £20m.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Aston Villa complete Donyell Malen transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa have officially completed the signing of Borussia Dortmund forward Donyell Malen . OFFICIAL: Aston Villa complete Donyell Malen transfer

Aston Villa is delighted to announce the signing of Dutch international Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund. The 25-year-old forward, who has over 100 career club goals, joins from the German giants for an undisclosed fee. Malen helped Dortmund reach the Champions League final last season and netted 13 Bundesliga goals. With nine goals in 41 international appearances, Malen is a key player for the Netherlands and represented his country at UEFA Euro 2024. He came through the ranks at PSV Eindhoven and scored 40 goals in 80 appearances before signing for Dortmund. Welcome, Donyell! 🇳🇱

arts.ttl: Club’s contract offer gives Everton transfer hope – Internal doubts pushing player towards exit
arts.sum: Everton’s hopes of signing Devyne Rensch may be high as Ajax are not convinced by the defender. That’s according to ESPN editor Thijs Zwagerman, relayed by Ajax Fans, who says a contract extension is difficult for the 21-year-old. A report earlier today stated Everton were in talks to sign Rensch from Ajax this month.
